message:
fix(core): use HashSet lookups in NDCG/MAP/MRR metrics and deduplicate retrieved docs

metrics_eval.rs: replace Vec::contains() with HashSet lookups in
NDCG@K, MAP, MRR, and Recall@K metric calculations, reducing
complexity from O(n*m) to O(n). Add a `seen` set in ndcg_at_k to
deduplicate retrieved documents before scoring, preventing inflated
relevance scores when the same document appears multiple times in
results.

parsed_query.rs: extend parsed query with additional classification
and normalization for improved query routing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
